macro_tide.description: Top-level aggregate regime summary for today's trading session

regime.description: Dominant risk regime for today's session

vix_trend.description: Direction of VIX over the last 24 hours

overall_market_bias.description: One sentence describing the dominant force driving the market today

key_risk_today.description: The single biggest invalidation risk that could flip the current regime

composite_risk_on_rate.description: Simple average of all risk_on_risk_off_rate values across macro_news, clamped to [0, 10]

summary.description: Factual summary of what happened — key data points, numbers, and event details

brief.description: So-what for today's trading session — how this catalyst affects intraday price action

release_date.description: Date and time the macro data or report was released (Format: MMM DD, YYYY, HH:MM EDT)

news_sentiment.description: Overall sentiment of this macro catalyst for the market

market_price_change_prediction.description: Predicted SPY intraday price change range in format: "-x.x% to +x.x%" (e.g. "-0.5% to +0.3%")

confidence.description: Confidence in this price change range (1–10)

success_probability.description: Probability that the price change prediction is correct (1–10)

collapse_trigger.description: Invalidation event — what would signal this prediction is wrong and how to detect it

conviction_detect.description: Signs that confirm this prediction is playing out with high conviction

source.description: Source of the macro news or report. Prefix with [UNVERIFIED] if only one source confirms it.

risk_on_risk_off.description: Whether this catalyst triggers risk-on or risk-off market sentiment

risk_on_risk_off_explanation.description: Explanation of why this catalyst triggers risk-on or risk-off sentiment

risk_on_risk_off_rate.description: Risk sentiment score: 10 = full risk-on, 0 = full risk-off, 5 = neutral

reason.description: Specific reasoning for the estimated price impact on today's intraday session
